name: Will Ferrell
blurb: One of SNL's defining cast members, a master of the committed, oversized character.
bio: Will Ferrell is an American comedian and actor who became one of Saturday Night Live's signature cast members from 1995 to 2002, creating characters like the cowbell-obsessed Gene Frenkle and a beloved George W. Bush. He went on to anchor comedy films including Anchorman and Step Brothers and co-founded the comedy site Funny or Die.

flags.note: Added 2026-06-17 discovery pass (expanded comedy-bit scope): minimum profile = bio + headshot + one verified clip; deepen via the audit game.
